message:
Add E2E tests for multi-tag and category filtering

Create comprehensive filter E2E tests covering:
- Single tag selection and deselection
- Clear tags button functionality
- Category filter selection
- All button clears category selection
- Category filtering prompts display
- Combined category and tag filtering
- URL state synchronization (load from URL, back/forward navigation)
- Combined search with filters

All 15 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
